productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Solid Black Sweaters
description: Composition Black striped  V-neck sweater made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, neck and hem, and a brand badge on the left chest Fitting Regular  Wash careHand or machine wash in cold water with mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry lowDry in shadeWarm ironThis black sweater with green accents from indigo nation is a classic piece that every man should have in his wardrobe. Complementing both casual and formal wear aptly, this sweater looks best when worn with basic full sleeve shirts and dark hued formal trousers, while the cotton knit fabric offers snug warmth.  Model's statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6.3" and shoulders 19"
